CustomField.description: If 3x Rent is Required, the applicant's monthly income must be greater than or equal to three times the unit's rent to proceed (waivers are not applicable, section 8 will allow them to proceed).
CustomField.formula:
IF(TEXT(IAW_R_3x_Rent_Requirement_z__c) = "", "Missing Expense Variable",
IF(TEXT(IAW_R_3x_Rent_Requirement_z__c) = "No", "Not Applicable",
IF(IAW_Monthly_Income_Eligibility__c >= (3 * IAW_Rent__c), "Yes",
"No")))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If 3x Rent is Required, the applicant's monthly income must be greater than or equal to three times the unit's rent to proceed (waivers are not applicable, section 8 will allow them to proceed).
CustomField.label: Meets 3x Rent Requirement?
